*HELB SUBSEQUENT APPLICATIONS UPDATE (2026/2027 ACADEMIC YEAR)*

The following HELB Subsequent Application windows are currently open:

вҖў Undergraduate Subsequent вҖ“ Closes on 31st August 2026
вҖў TVET Subsequent вҖ“ Closes on 31st July 2026
вҖў Diploma Level 6 Subsequent вҖ“ Closes on 31st August 2026
вҖў TVET Craft Certificate (Level 5) Subsequent вҖ“ Closes on 31st August 2026

HELB funding is limited to the official duration of your programme. For example:

вҖў 4-year programme вҖ“ Up to 4 loan applications
вҖў 3-year programme вҖ“ Up to 3 loan applications
вҖў 2-year programme вҖ“ Up to 2 loan applications
вҖў 5-year programme вҖ“ Up to 5 loan applications

Students are encouraged to submit their applications early to avoid last-minute challenges and delays in processing.

Apply through the HELB App or by dialing *642# or *334#.

рҹҺ“ KUCCPS UPDATE 2026 рҹҺ“

рҹ“ў Placement is expected to be finalized this month, after which the Transfer Application Window is expected to open in July 2026.

рҹ“Ң What should you do now?

вң… Prepare all the required documents for:
вҖў Government Funding
вҖў HELB Loan Application

вҡЎ HELB applications are often processed on a first-come, first-served basis, so early preparation is important.

рҹ‘¶ Below 18 years of age?
вң… Open a Junior Bank Account as early as possible.

рҹҶ” Do you have an ID Card?
вң… Register for a KRA PIN.
вң… Open a bank account if you wish.
вң… M-PESA can still be used as a mode of payment.

рҹҸ« TVET Students
вң… You are eligible for both Government Funding and HELB Loan.
вҸі Course applications are closing soonвҖ”don't miss out.

в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ

вҡ пёҸ IMPORTANT NOTICE

рҹҹў Government Funding Application вҖ“ COMPULSORY for all eligible students.

рҹ”ө HELB Loan Application вҖ“ OPTIONAL, but highly recommended for students who need financial support.

рҹ“Ӯ Prepare early.
рҹ“Ӣ Keep your documents ready.

history_120363404376325576@g.us.name: SethG
history_120363404376325576@g.us.text: If I fall, donвҖҷt bring me back. There is a strange poetry in the descent, a freedom in surrendering to gravityвҖҷs gentle insistence. Every stumble writes a story on the skin, every tumble teaches a lesson the mind canвҖҷt invent. To catch me would be to deny the art of breaking, the elegance of learning to rise alone. Life isnвҖҷt measured by how often we avoid falling, but by the courage to let ourselves fall, knowing we might soar higher than ever imagined afterward. Sometimes, falling is the only way to truly fly.
